inputs.prompt: [Image1] is a 9-panel storyboard — editorial coverage of ONE scene in a golden-automata forge (the smith Hephaestus inspecting one of the automata he builds). Use it as an ingredient reference for the world, character, palette, and the coverage beats; do NOT reproduce the grid, panels, borders, or captions. Bring this scene to life as cinematic video, drawing on the coverage. A painterly concept-art forge: cool blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze; the seams are visible, nothing is smooth or over-rendered. Hephaestus — fair-haired, bearded, weary — works the line and lifts one finished automaton to study its face; sparks scatter, steam drifts, the long line of identical gold figures recedes into the blue dark.
